target: Product persistence read-path resilience for malformed localStorage data

verificationEnvironment.verificationTool: Chrome DevTools Protocol direct WebSocket client
verificationEnvironment.reasonForSelection: Playwright module resolution failed in the current toolchain; CDP verifies the same browser runtime outcomes without changing application source.
verificationEnvironment.knownLimitations: CDP evidence is based on runtime results, DOM selectors, console events, page exceptions, network failures, and screenshot capture.

server.startupStdout: External Vite dev server supplied by verification harness.

steps: Navigate to Products through the visible Sidebar item
Invoke the active product service read path in browser runtime
Verify malformed JSON is contained and safe default is returned
Verify valid JSON read behavior remains unchanged
Capture DOM, console, exceptions, network errors, and screenshot
